headline: Growing an Income Tree: From $27,000 to $66,000
summary: A portfolio that pays $27,000 a year in dividends sounds modest. Left alone for a little more than a decade of steady dividend growth, that same income stream can quietly grow toward $66,000 without a single additional dollar of savings. That is the basic appeal of dividend growth investing: the arithmetic of today’s yield matters, ... Growing an Income Tree: From $27,000 to $66,000
